heading: Procedure
body:
*Estimated completion time: 2 minutes*

To add a database user to your cluster:

Click the Connect button for your federated database instance.

You'll use this username and password combination to access data on
your cluster.

> **Note:** If your password contains special characters, you will need to
> encode them. For more information, see
> [Special characters in connection string password](atlas/troubleshoot-connection).

> **See Also:** For information on configuring additional database users on your
> cluster, see [Configure Database Users](atlas/security-add-mongodb-users).
